title: validate input spec
description: Spec for `hpc-mapreduce validate`. Probes the scheduler's --test-only mode for the resource ask and returns the predicted submission timing. No submit side effect.

constraint.description: GPU type or feature constraint passed to --constraint. Null or '<cpu-only>' selects the CPU-only branch.

backfill_window_sec.description: ETA threshold for the fits_backfill flag.
